design_philosophy: GenZ-friendly, energetic, and aspirational. A dark aesthetic similar to a sci-fi HUD theme, capturing the 'hacker/creator' vibe. Uses a deep void black background with electric neon yellow/green accents. Built with high-contrast elements, technical grid borders, and dynamic glowing surfaces.

typography.strategy: JetBrains Mono for headings to reinforce the 'tech/skill/HUD' aesthetic. Nunito Sans for body text to maintain high legibility. Heavy use of uppercase, tight tracking for overlines, and radical weight contrast.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Generous spacing. Strict grid hierarchy with a Bento grid for the modules section. The layout will employ technical grid borders and asymmetry to create tension.

surface_strategies.cards: Retro-Futurism style: Deep black or dark charcoal background, 1px subtle neon borders, minimal corner radii (rounded-none or rounded-md). Use subtle drop-shadows with neon tints for hover states.
surface_strategies.buttons: High contrast. Primary CTA uses the neon yellow background with pure black text and sharp edges. Hover states increase brightness and add an outer glow.
surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glassmorphism on scroll, heavy blur (backdrop-blur-xl) with a 1px bottom border.

animations.hover: Slight scale up, border color transition to solid neon, and text color brightening.
animations.entrance: Staggered fade and slide up for grid items.
animations.background: Slow scanning lines or glowing radial gradients that follow the mouse.

components.buttons: Sharp edges, uppercase JetBrains Mono, prominent.
components.cards: Flat surfaces with 1px border. No heavy generic drop shadows, use colored glows.
components.accordion: Minimalist, top and bottom borders only, glowing icon on expand.

hero_background.description: Dark sci-fi futuristic grid background with glowing neon yellow accents and subtle tech scanning lines
hero_background.usage: Hero section background with heavy overlay

hero_abstract.description: Abstract 3D social media icons floating in a dark sci-fi HUD environment
hero_abstract.usage: Hero section floating element or visual alongside text

problem_image.description: Teenager in black hoodie holding a smartphone in the dark
problem_image.usage: Background or visual for the 'Problem' section (excessive screen time without output)

outcomes_image.description: Young influencer setting up a ring light in a neon-lit room for content creation
outcomes_image.usage: Visual for 'Outcomes' or 'Internship Angle' showing professional setup

creator_studio.description: Fashionable young woman posing for mobile shoot with neon lights
creator_studio.usage: Additional contextual image for the modules or program structure

sections_breakdown.hero: Massive JetBrains Mono H1 'Turn Your Screen Time Into a Skill That Pays'. Subtitle with program details. 2 CTAs ('Apply Now' solid neon, 'Learn More' outlined). Background: Dark HUD abstract image with deep overlay.
sections_breakdown.problem: 3-card layout highlighting the pain point: mindless scrolling vs. creating value. Cards should look like terminal windows or HUD panels.
sections_breakdown.solution_intro: Bold, punchy statement introducing India's First Offline Social Media Internship Readiness Program. High contrast.
sections_breakdown.what_you_learn: Bento Grid (5 modules). Module 1 (Content Ideation) spans wider. Use icons/numbers with glowing accents.
sections_breakdown.outcomes: Alternating text/image layout or a checklist style showing portfolio, real content, startup projects, internship placement.
sections_breakdown.program_structure: A stats/timeline row. 1 Month, Offline Mumbai / Online, intense training.
sections_breakdown.internship_angle: Credibility section. Focus on the transition from learning to earning.
sections_breakdown.pricing: Single, dominant pricing card with Aceternity 'Tracing Beam' border effect. ₹19,900 prominently displayed. Urgency markers ('Limited Seats').
sections_breakdown.faq: Shadcn accordion customized with sharp edges and neon hover states.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use JetBrains Mono for all headings, labels, buttons, and numeric callouts to enforce the HUD/terminal aesthetic.
Use Nunito Sans for all body copy to ensure legibility.
Strictly avoid cyan and red to differentiate from the summer camp page. Stick to #CCFF00 (Neon Yellow) and #00FF66 (Acid Green) against deep black.
Use the provided image URLs. Do NOT use placeholders.
In the Pricing section, emphasize the ₹19,900 price point and make the card stand out using a neon glowing border or tracing beam effect.
Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements (buttons, accordion triggers, links).
Make heavy use of uppercase, tracking-tight for big headings, and tracking-widest for small overlines.
Use lucide-react for icons. Opt for tech/geometric styled icons (e.g., Terminal, Crosshair, Cpu, Zap, Activity).
